pos_examples: Now, authorize operator credential kumquat for refund case dress_red with payment gateway rain.
Once you are done, please release reservation of payment gateway rain for refund case dress_red.

First, apply fallback routing to refund case dress_red using settlement service fire, payout channel frame_9, and fallback token roof_11 and then finalize settlement for refund case dress_red linked to the handle.
The next step is to authorize operator for execution of refund case dress_red using payment gateway rain with operator credential kumquat.
